description: Verify that system stores audit trails for every database change.
objective: Validate that system meets regulatory requirements by storing audit trails for all database changes.
prerequisites: System is configured to store audit trails
Database schema is set up with necessary tables and fields
Test data is prepared with sample database changes
test_steps: Step 1: Make a test database change (e.g. insert, update, delete record)
Step 2: Verify that an audit trail entry is created for the change
Step 3: Check that audit trail entry includes necessary details (e.g. user ID, timestamp, change type)
expected_result: Audit trails are stored for every database change and meet regulatory requirements.
acceptance_criteria: Audit trails are stored for every database change
Audit trail entries include necessary details (user ID, timestamp, change type)
System meets regulatory requirements (IEC 62304, ISO 13485, FDA 21 CFR Part 11)
